subcodes.first_line: O thou who art assured in God! Rest thou confident that at all times thou hast been, and shalt ever remain, the object of the tender gaze of the Blessed Beauty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای موقن بالله در جمیع اوقات ملحوظ نظر عنایت جمال مبارک بوده و هستی مطمئن باش
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
